name: Affiliates - Get Leads of a particular Affiliate

content.query:
SELECT distinct
[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Zip4]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
,cst.[CustomerID]
,cst.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
WHERE
cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
and lds.LeadSubSourceID in
(
SELECT
[Division]+'-'+trim(STR([srs_id])) as SRS_ID
 FROM [RDM].[AFFILIATES_SRS_MAPPING]
 where AffiliateName = 'Lavin'
 )
